signals.title: Dominion Energy, Santee Cooper receive state approval for $5B gas project
signals.summary: The South Carolina Public Service Commission dismissed calls from the Sierra Club to impose a cost cap on the Canadys project or require the utilities to commit to retiring coal-fired units.

signals.title: 40-17F2 - BNY MELLON HIGH YIELD STRATEGIES FUND (0001057861) (Subject)
Astrobotic unveils Griffin-1 lunar lander
signals.summary:
Astrobotic showed off the lunar lander it plans to launch later this year that will be the vanguard of NASA’s new lunar base ambitions. 
 The post  Astrobotic unveils Griffin-1 lunar lander  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: Katalyst Space raises $12 million for GEO servicing demo mission
signals.summary:
Satellite servicing startup Katalyst Space Technologies has raised $12 million for a geosynchronous orbit demonstration as its mission to boost the orbit of a NASA observatory nears launch. 
 The post  Katalyst Space raises $12 million for GEO servicing demo mission  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: France picks MBDA-Safran combo to supply multiple rocket launcher
signals.summary: Paris snubbed competing offers from Thales and ArianeGroup, as well as from U.S. defense giant Lockheed Martin and South Korea's Hanwha Aerospace.

signals.title: China pushes for AI safety as G7 summit wraps up without Beijing
signals.summary: China included artificial intelligence in its global governance whitepaper published Wednesday, and said Beijing was speeding up cooperation efforts.

signals.title: Anthropic asked for regulation. Washington went much further
signals.summary: Anthropic has long been supportive of AI regulation, but the Trump administration is coming down particularly hard on the AI company.

signals.title: Deep Space Network antenna mishap blamed on poor training and procedures
signals.summary:
A NASA investigation blamed millions of dollars in damage to one of its largest Deep Space Network (DSN) antennas on poor training and procedures. 
 The post  Deep Space Network antenna mishap blamed on poor training and procedures  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: Trump says U.S. will 'go right back to dropping bombs' if he doesn't like Iran deal

signals.title: Intel begins production of most-advanced chip, inching closer to possible Apple deal
signals.summary: Intel is entering production of 18A-P, its most-advanced chip node that could be the target of a coming deal with Apple

signals.title: China conducts 4 launches in 3 days, but silence follows Kuaizhou–11 launch
signals.summary:
China continued its accelerated launch pace with a series of missions, but long silence followed liftoff of a Kuaizhou-11 solid rocket Wednesday, suggesting potential issues. 
 The post  China conducts 4 launches in 3 days, but silence follows Kuaizhou–11 launch  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: Poland weighs joining X-BAT autonomous vertical-takeoff fighter program
signals.summary: The announcement comes as the Polish government is mulling plans to acquire up to 32 new fighter jets.

signals.title: Coinbase introduces AI adviser, stock options, and pre-IPO markets in finance push
Coinbase to join tokenized stock race with onchain shares, dividend payments
'A signal of where power sits': Trump and world leaders joined by OpenAI, Anthropic, Google at G7
signals.summary: Frontier AI risks, infrastructure and sovereignty are all expected to be discussed at the world leaders' summit.

signals.title: Dawn Aerospace raises $25 million
signals.summary:
Dawn Aerospace has raised $25 million to scale up its work in both in-space transportation and suborbital spaceplanes. 
 The post  Dawn Aerospace raises $25 million  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: Look Up and Skynopy partner on automated satellite collision avoidance service
signals.summary:
Space surveillance venture Look Up plans to use Skynopy’s ground station network to help automate its proposed low Earth orbit collision avoidance service, the French startups announced June 17. 
 The post  Look Up and Skynopy partner on automated satellite collision avoidance service  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: CME Group's Terry Duffy to step down in 2027, CFO Lynne Fitzpatrick to become CEO
signals.summary: Duffy, 67, will transition to executive chairman effective March 1, 2027, the company said Wednesday.

signals.title: Carvana’s new vehicle strategy turns dealership into ‘playground,’ test-drive center with sales all online
signals.summary: But don't expect Carvana to sell you a vehicle at one of its seven Stellantis stores, marking a stark contrast from typical franchised dealers.

signals.title: 'Passive' investors who dodged bitcoin are now forced to own SpaceX, which is three times more volatile
signals.summary: Many advisors and money-managers invested in index funds who will soon be owners of Elon Musk's astronomic ambitions

signals.title: More united Fed board seen at Warsh's first meeting, according to Kalshi traders
signals.summary: Traders on prediction market platform Kalshi largely forecast a unanimous decision among FOMC members at Wednesday's meeting, after April's divided vote.

signals.title: SpaceX gains 2% after surpassing Amazon in market cap
signals.summary: Elon Musk's space and AI company has seen its stock surge since its blockbuster IPO on Friday.

signals.title: US Army’s ‘Tropic Lightning’ Division ponders transformation lessons from Philippine war games
signals.summary: Because of HIMARS, Maj. Gen. Bartholomees pointed out his “division artillery is really what transformed the most.”

signals.title: Mortgage rates are now falling but demand is still weaker
signals.summary: A mixed week for mortgage rates resulted in less demand from both current homeowners and potential homebuyers.

signals.title: Abercrombie & Fitch begins selling third-party shoe brands in latest bid to chase growth
signals.summary: Abercrombie & Fitch's explosive growth has slowed, leading the apparel retailer to expand into new categories to boost sales

signals.title: BMW stock slumps to 5-year low as Iran war and China slowdown spark profit warning
signals.summary: BMW blamed a slowdown in its Chinese market, as well as disruption from the Iran war, as two reasons for the slashed guidance.

signals.title: CNBC to wade further into live sports with 11 simulcast WNBA games
signals.summary: The simulcasts will expose the WNBA to an affluent audience on CNBC and marks a new chapter for the business news network after it spun out from Comcast.

signals.title: [13F] Pershing Square (Ackman) — nuovo filing 2024-07-29
signals.summary: Controlla il filing per vedere le nuove posizioni aperte/aumentate.

signals.title: [13F] Scion Asset Mgmt (Burry) — nuovo filing 2023-08-10
signals.summary: Controlla il filing per vedere le nuove posizioni aperte/aumentate.

signals.title: Northeast states eye offshore HVDC transmission as Trump drops wind fight
signals.summary: Three reports published Monday lay out recommendations for development of an offshore transmission system and highlight the potential for high voltage direct current technology.

signals.title: Bill limiting investors from buying homes set to speed through Congress
signals.summary: Top lawmakers reached an agreement on a key housing bill that would limit investor ownership, clearing the way for passage through both chambers of Congress.

signals.title: DOE extends TransAlta Centralia Unit 2 emergency order
signals.summary: The U.S. Department of Energy on Friday said the order to keep the last coal plant in Washington state online is needed to help meet peak summer demand.

signals.title: Peak Energy, GM partner to scale domestic sodium-ion battery supplies
signals.summary: Peak cofounder and CEO Landon Mossburg told Utility Dive the technology is “purpose-built” for AI data centers and grid-scale applications.

signals.title: In wildfire country, every home should be a microgrid
signals.summary: As wildfire risk grows, there are increasing calls to “bury the lines.” Undergrounding has its place, but it's not the only answer, writes Cameron Brooks, executive director of Think Microgrid.

signals.title: Modular approach can speed data center construction by 30%: Flex
signals.summary: More power, cooling and IT equipment is moving outside data halls in a shift that could help “future-proof” computing facilities, a company executive told Facilities Dive.

signals.title: Energy Dome, Salt River Project to build 19-MW CO2 battery system
signals.summary: The project is expected to come online in 2029 and store enough energy to power around 4,275 homes for 10 hours, Salt River Project said.

signals.title: U.S. senators urge Treasury not to leave states out of GENIUS Act stablecoin process

signals.summary:

signals.title: Size matters: KNDS pitches long-barreled artillery for 60-kilometer base range
signals.summary: The 155mm howitzer is equipped with a girthy 58 caliber gun tube, about 12% longer than the 52 caliber barrels common in Europe.

signals.title: Three Iranian tankers exit U.S. blockade for first time in months as shipowners eye Hormuz in 'wary disbelief'
signals.summary: At least three Iranian tankers carrying nearly five million barrels of crude oil have exited the U.S. Navy blockade.

signals.title: Central banks are bringing gold reserves home as geopolitical risks rise
signals.summary: Central banks expect gold reserves to rise and more are storing bullion at home amid geopolitical and currency risks.

signals.title: Ineos and Daimler Truck enlist in auto defense push as Europe bolsters military spending
signals.summary: The partnership is one of a spate of auto-defense collaborations announced in recent weeks.

signals.title: Utility sector outlook deteriorates on affordability concerns: Fitch
signals.summary: Utilities are expected to make $240 billion in capital expenditures this year, but political and regulatory pressure could put timely cost recovery at risk, the ratings agency said.

signals.title: Swiss decision to not contribute to Copernicus tests program’s value model
signals.summary:

Our ongoing list of current private space companies with a valuation of $1 billion or more.

signals.summary:

signals.title: Renault teams up with Thales to boost France’s drone production
signals.summary: The carmaker will build Thales’ Toutatis remotely operated loitering munitions at one of its factories, with estimated production of 1,000 units a month.

signals.title: As Europe rearms, ‘wingman’ aircraft take center stage
signals.summary: European and U.S. defense forces are rapidly developing their own AI-powered drones to complement their fighter jets and carry extra battlefield tech.

signals.title: MBDA advances land version of its naval missile as European strike weapon
signals.summary: Europe lacks long-range strike options that provide deterrence by holding Russian assets at risk, a gap that countries are trying to patch.

signals.title: Rheinmetall pitches shipping container that can spit out swarms of attack drones
signals.summary: One container can hold 18 of the company’s FV-014 munitions, meant to plop out of the container by way of rocket-assisted start.

signals.title: UK inflation holds steady at 2.8% in May
signals.summary: The Bank of England is due to update its monetary policy on Thursday.

signals.title: Japan May exports grow at fastest pace in over three years, beating estimates, as chip demand soars
signals.summary: Japan's exports in May grew at their fastest pace since November 2022, boosted by robust demand for cars and semiconductors.

signals.title: Technical factors are adding fuel to SpaceX's meme stock fire
signals.summary: Options, leveraged ETFs and index arbitrage are likely boosting the stock ahead of its inclusion in some benchmark stock indexes.

signals.title: Rivian laying off hundreds of workers amid R2 launch
signals.summary: Rivian said Tuesday it was laying off hundreds of workers, or less than 2% of its workforce.

signals.title: How Roku fits into Fox's future — and what investors are missing about the deal
signals.summary: Fox's stock dropped following its announcement that it will acquire Roku for $22 billion. Analysts still think it's a good deal.

signals.title: Michael Burry says he's tempted to bet against SpaceX, but passes on expensive options
signals.summary: Burry argued the company's market capitalization had reached levels that dwarf many established businesses and fortunes.

signals.title: Databricks sales growth tops 80%, but margin are shrinking from swarm of AI agents
signals.summary: Databricks is seeing higher growth as AI agents assist with data analysis, but all that activity is significantly increasing costs.

signals.title: DOJ assists Musk's xAI in NAACP air pollution suit, asks court to toss case
signals.summary: The DOJ is asking a Mississippi federal court to dismiss a lawsuit filed by the NAACP against Elon Musk's xAI, now owned by SpaceX.

signals.title: Jim Cramer says SpaceX investors aren't buying earnings — they're buying Elon Musk
signals.summary: CNBC's Jim Cramer said SpaceX investors are betting on Elon Musk's vision and track record, rather than the company's current earnings power.

signals.title: Telegram's Durov says India punishing 150 million users after country temporarily bans messaging app
signals.summary: India has temporarily restricted access to the messaging app Telegram in an effort to prevent exam fraud. Telegram has slammed the ban.

signals.title: SpaceX rises 4% to leapfrog Amazon in market cap, closes short of Microsoft
signals.summary: CEO Elon Musk said Sunday that the company "might be able to reach approximately" $1 trillion revenue in 2030.

signals.title: Geospatial industry launches maritime initiative
signals.summary:

signals.title: Tianwen-2 makes series of burns on approach to asteroid, according to radio tracking
signals.summary:
China’s Tianwen-2 spacecraft has carried out a series of small propulsive maneuvers following a main burn June 7, setting up an asteroid rendezvous in July. 
 The post  Tianwen-2 makes series of burns on approach to asteroid, according to radio tracking   appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: Gilat to buy Comtech satcoms business six years after failed merger
signals.summary:
Israel’s Gilat Satellite Networks plans to expand its defense capabilities by acquiring most of Comtech’s space-related communications business, six years after the U.S. company’s own takeover bid collapsed. 
 The post  Gilat to buy Comtech satcoms business six years after failed merger  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: DARPA to explore ways to rapidly rebuild satellite networks if attacked

signals.title: KNDS proposes mixed French-German tank to replace France’s Leclerc
signals.summary: The French-Germany company plans for an in-house active protection system and the ability to change out the 120mm gun with a 140mm variant.

signals.title: Ukraine’s demand for tiny drone laser-targeting systems spurs new product launches
signals.summary: Companies rush to miniaturize the technology for marking targets on the battlefield, making it suitable to ride on small unmanned aerial vehicles.

signals.title: India touts new ballistic missile defense prowess after tests
signals.summary: India aims to joint a small club of countries capable of bringing down incoming missiles with technology made domestically.

signals.title: General Atomics awarded US Army contract for extended-range artillery round
signals.summary: During a test last year, the company's projectile hit targets more than 74 miles away after being fired from an M777 howitzer.

signals.title: Russian strategic bomber crashes in Siberia during training exercise
signals.summary: The Soviet-era supersonic bomber has most recently been used by Russia for combat missions in Syria and Ukraine.

signals.title: Iran, US agree to halt war and reopen Hormuz
signals.summary: The memorandum of understanding is scheduled to be officially signed on Friday in Switzerland.

signals.title: Distributed solar’s overlooked role: Keeping farmland out of the real estate market
signals.summary: If we want farmland to stay farmland, we have to be open-minded about what farming looks like today, writes Abby Broedlin, vice president of asset management at Nautilus Solar Energy.

signals.title: AI load growth is changing the utility business model
signals.summary: Large-load demand is transforming utility strategy, regulation, and investment.

signals.title: Australia forges ahead with 155mm ammo production

signals.summary: Once derided as primitive, roof-mounted armor variants have been adopted by both Russian and Ukrainian forces as drone threats proliferate.

signals.title: France prepares Ukraine-inspired ‘kill web’ for battlefield awareness
signals.summary: The kill web will be part of the broader Arcadia AI-powered battlefield command and control structure, a top French commander said.
